description: A systems engineer is designing the architecture for a new integrated avionics suite, including flight displays, flight management systems, and communication radios.

nodes.task_description: Define the functional requirements and interfaces for all avionics subsystems.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a complete requirements document.

nodes.task_description: Create a system architecture diagram showing how all the subsystems connect and exchange data.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a clear and accurate architecture diagram.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data bus loading to ensure the chosen architecture (e.g., ARINC 664) can handle the required data throughput.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent performs the analysis and confirms the data bus has sufficient capacity.
